languages.text: "Таким образом, моя цель — под носом у этой Погонщицы. А пока она жива, я тут застрял{mf||а} без связи?"
"So that means my goal is right under the nose of this Drover. And while it is alive, I will be stuck here with no communications?"
languages.original_text: "Таким образом, моя цель — под носом у этой Погонщицы. А пока она жива, я тут застрял{mf||а} без связи?"

traits.locale_text: "So that means my goal is under the nose of this Drover. And until it is dead, I shall be stuck here with no communications?"
"So that means my goal is right under the nose of this Drover. And while it is alive, I will be stuck here with no communications?"
"So my goal is under the nose of this Drover. And until it is dead, I shall be stuck here? That leaves me no choice."
"So that means my goal is under the nose of this Drover. And until it is dead, I shall be stuck here with no communications?"
"So that means my goal is right under the nose of this Drover. And while it is alive, I will be stuck here with no communications?"
"So that means my goal is right under the nose of this Drover. And while it is alive, I will be stuck here with no communications?"

languages.text: 「このドルーバーの目の前で、目標が死なない限り、私はここに留められる。選択肢はない」
languages.original_text: "So my goal is under the nose of this Drover. And until it is dead, I shall be stuck here? That leaves me no choice."

traits.locale_text: 「このドルーバーの目の前で、目標が死なない限り、私はここに留められる。選択肢はない。」

languages.text: "Mein Ziel ist also direkt vor der Nase dieses Treibers. Und solange er lebt, sitze ich hier ohne Kommunikationssysteme fest?"
languages.original_text: "So that means my goal is right under the nose of this Drover. And while it is alive, I will be stuck here with no communications?"

traits.locale_text: "Mein Ziel ist also direkt vor der Nase dieses Treibers. Und solange er lebt, sitze ich hier ohne Kommunikationssysteme fest?"

languages.text: « Autrement dit, mon objectif se trouve juste sous le nez du Chasseur. Et tant qu'il est en vie, je suis {mf|coincé|coincée} ici sans possibilité de communiquer ? »
languages.original_text: "So that means my goal is right under the nose of this Drover. And while it is alive, I will be stuck here with no communications?"

traits.locale_text: « Autrement dit, mon objectif se trouve juste sous le nez du Chasseur. Et tant qu'il est en vie, je suis {mf|coincé|coincée} ici sans possibilité de communiquer ? »

languages.text: «¿Eso significa que mi objetivo está justo al lado del Pastor, y que mientras viva estoy atascad{mf|o|a} aquí, sin comunicaciones?».
languages.original_text: "So that means my goal is right under the nose of this Drover. And while it is alive, I will be stuck here with no communications?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Eso significa que mi objetivo está justo al lado del Pastor, y que mientras viva estoy atascad{mf|o|a} aquí, sin comunicaciones?».

languages.text: "Yani bu, hedefimin şu Çoban'ın burnunun dibinde olduğu anlamına geliyor. O hayattayken iletişim kuramayacak, burada mahsur kalacağım mu kalacağım?"
languages.original_text: "So that means my goal is right under the nose of this Drover. And while it is alive, I will be stuck here with no communications?"

traits.locale_text: "Yani bu, hedefimin şu Çoban'ın burnunun dibinde olduğu anlamına geliyor. O hayattayken iletişim kuramayacak, burada mahsur kalacağım mu kalacağım?"

languages.text: “这么说，我的目标就在那只拒生花的眼皮底下？只要它还活着，我就得被困在这儿，无法跟外界通信？”
languages.original_text: "So that means my goal is right under the nose of this Drover. And while it is alive, I will be stuck here with no communications?"

traits.locale_text: “这么说，我的目标就在那只拒生花的眼皮底下？只要它还活着，我就得被困在这儿，无法跟外界通信？”
